body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"bead depth 3 reached max_decomposition_depth 3; operator must split","fingerprint":"94c841f916ea8dd55f9c10e471020fe274d118cdf54d7997ef0f8baecea57445","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"decomposition_depth_cap","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.decomposition_depth_cap","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"Fails nearly every lint criterion: the title is not a clear imperative scope, the description is duplicated/truncated and lacks file:line-grounded current-state detail, acceptance criteria do not name Test* symbols or a unique go test -run filter, the required pkg-scoped go test command is missing, labels lack area/kind/cross-reference facets, deps are not listed, and the prompt is not yet a sufficient standalone sub-agent brief.","score":0,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative subsystem scope, e.g. \"Add raw-transcript audit event and Story 16 e2e coverage\".","Condense the description into one PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE / PROPOSED FIX / NON-SCOPE block and cite concrete file:line anchors for the current-state gaps.","Replace the acceptance criteria with numbered, testable checks that name specific Test* symbols or a unique go test -run filter.","Add the exact package-scoped command `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` alongside `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Add labels covering phase, area, kind, and at least one cross-reference facet; move story-only metadata out of labels if it is not a facet.","Populate deps explicitly in the bead record or state `No deps.` if none are required.","Split or narrow the bead so one agent can execute it without needing the parent history or truncated context."],"waivers_applied":[]}
